text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I woke up early to do some extra<n>training...
Before I knew it, the sun had<n>set.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I was so absorbed in training... I lost<n>track of
time...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Or perhaps, the flow of time distorted<n>as it
passed through another dimension...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...If it means I can catch up with my<n>friend, then
maybe that's not such a bad<n>thing... hehe.
